visual.name: prosankey
visual.description: Professional Sankey / flow diagram visual for Power BI with loop-safe layout, path tracing, and auto-bucket.

en-US.Visual_EmptyState_NoFields: Drop at least two fields into Levels and a measure into Value, or bind Source + Target + Value.
en-US.Visual_EmptyState_PartialLevels: Drop a second field into Levels to complete the flow — e.g., Region, then Category.
en-US.Visual_EmptyState_NoValue: Drag a numeric measure into the Value field to define flow size.
en-US.Visual_EmptyState_NoRows: No data matches the current filter context.
en-US.Visual_EmptyState_NeedGraphFields: Graph mode needs Source, Target, and Value fields.
en-US.Visual_EmptyState_NeedHybridFields: Hybrid mode: bind Levels and Source/Target.
en-US.Visual_EmptyState_HybridRequiresPro: Hybrid Mode requires Pro — using Path Mode.
en-US.Visual_EmptyState_ProLevelsLocked: Levels 4+ require ProSankey Pro. Showing the first 3 levels (up to 16 levels with Pro).
en-US.EmptyState_NoFields: Drop at least two fields into Levels and a measure into Value, or bind Source + Target + Value.
en-US.EmptyState_PartialLevels: Drop a second field into Levels to complete the flow — e.g., Region, then Category.
en-US.EmptyState_NoValue: Drag a numeric measure into the Value field to define flow size.
en-US.EmptyState_NoRows: No data matches the current filter context.
en-US.EmptyState_ProLevelsLocked: Levels 4+ require ProSankey Pro. Showing the first 3 levels (up to 16 levels with Pro).

dataRoles.name: source
dataRoles.description: Source node (Graph Mode). Binding Source + Target switches to explicit edge list.

dataRoles.name: sourceCategory
dataRoles.description: Optional node category for Source Node. Graph/Hybrid only; pure Path mode ignores this role.

dataRoles.name: targetCategory
dataRoles.description: Optional node category for Target Node. Graph/Hybrid only; pure Path mode ignores this role.

dataRoles.name: time
dataRoles.description: Optional time/period field for temporal unfolding in Graph Mode.

dataRoles.name: edgeType
dataRoles.description: Optional Graph/Hybrid edge category used to split and style flows by type. Pure Path mode ignores this role.

dataRoles.name: tooltipFields
dataRoles.description: Extra data shown in flow hover tooltips. Graph uses edge-row summaries; Path propagates path-row summaries to generated segments.

dataRoles.name: levels
dataRoles.description: Flow hierarchy (Path Mode). Drop up to 16 fields; order in the well is level order. First 3 levels are Free; 4-16 require ProSankey Pro.
